environment_prompt: A casual home kitchen with a gas stovetop, a carbon-steel wok with green leafy vegetables and minced garlic being stir-fried, steam rising, oil glistening on the food, a wooden cutting board beside the stove holding four to five seasoning bottles of various colors and types (soy sauce, vinegar, chili oil) including an oil bottle, a small dish of dried red chili peppers nearby, slightly worn countertop and wooden cabinets adding realism, warm kitchen lighting, a metal spatula resting against the wok edge.
perspective_prompt: First-person point of view looking down at the wok on the stovetop, one gloved hand visible from the bottom of the frame holding a metal spatula actively stirring, close-up cooking perspective.

interactions.action: The viewer stops stir-frying, picks up an oil bottle, and pours oil into the hot wok.
The viewer adds chili peppers into the wok.
The viewer continues stir-frying the vegetables with the spatula.
